product.description: This superior-grade krill oil is a whole lipid extract made from the oil of tiny, shrimp-like crustaceans (Euphausia superba), harvested from the pristine oceans of Antarctica under certified sustainable standards and virtually free of mercury and contaminants. It is developed using an exclusive and patented technology which removes undesirable salts while up-concentrating beneficial constituents, to result in unprecedented digestibility, absorption and potency.

metaData.Ingredients:
Ingredients per 1 softgel:
NKO Original Krill Oil 500mg (contains 280mg Phospholipids, 135mg Omega-3 Fatty Acids (75mg EPA and 35mg DHA), 43mcg Astaxanthin), Choline 35mg

This product contains crustaceans. Please exercise caution if you are allergic to shellfish. If you are pregnant or nursing, please consult your physician for advice.
metaData.Key Information:
• Heavy metal tested

• Non-GMO

• Gluten-Free

• No fishy after-taste

• Proven to promote heart, brain, liver, joint, and emotional health
metaData.Preparation:
1 to 2 softgels daily with water


• For joint health: 1 softgel daily

• For brain health: 1 softgel daily
• For liver health: 2 softgels daily for the first 3 months, 1 softgel daily thereafter for maintenance
• For eye health: 2 softgels daily for the first 3 months, 1 softgel daily thereafter for maintenance
• For skin health: 2 softgels daily for the first 3 months, 1 softgel daily thereafter for maintenance
• For women’s wellness: 4 softgels daily for the first month; cyclic intake thereafter 8 days prior to and 2 days during menstruation

metaData.Key Information:
EC Sports Neurosharp Cognitive Support is a brain supplement to boost memory, focus and mood for an overall healthy brain function.

The all-natural brain health supplement with no artificial ingredients, GMOs, chemicals, colour additives and preservatives serves to meet the daily requirements of nutrients such as Vitamin B6, Vitamin B12, Folic Acid, Bacopa and Lion Mane Extract for the overall improvement on brain clarity, concentration and cognitive function.

While Lion’s Mane is an ingredient formulated to improve brain productivity and protecting the brains from possible age-related cognitive decline, Bacopa is another key ingredient for mood balance to support healthy oxidative stress response and recovery.

Consuming brain supplements on a daily basis helps to support the everyday living activities effectively by enhancing the capabilities of the brain to its full potential while maintaining the brain development and healthier brain process over time.
metaData.Preparation: Take three (3) capsules at any time of the day, preferably with food or as directed by your healthcare professional. Do not exceed the recommended dosage. Individuals with known medical conditions should consult with a healthcare professional before using this or any dietary supplement. Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place.
